event.title: I Love Free Software Day in Bozen-Bolzano, Italia

body.p: The LUGBZ (Linux User Group Bozen-Bolzano-Bulsan) and the FUSS Project are happy to welcome Free Software Enthusiasts and citizens that want to understand what Free Software and Digital Sustainability are.

Where: spazio77, Dalmatienstraße 77 - via Dalmazia 77, Bozen-Bolzano, South Tyrol, Italy
When: 10.02.2025 - 20:00-23:00 (CET)
